app.name: Cumond
app.tagline: Find the right time together – no tracking, no account. End-to-end encrypted, hosted in Switzerland.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This privacy policy explains how Cumond handles your data.
privacy.principleText: Cumond uses a zero-knowledge architecture. All poll data (title, description, location, time slots and responses) is encrypted in your browser using AES-256-GCM before reaching the server. The encryption key is stored exclusively in the URL fragment (after the # sign) and is never transmitted to the server. This means: we cannot read or analyse your poll data.
privacy.dataEncrypted: Encrypted poll data: Stored on the server only in encrypted form. Without the key in the link, this data is unreadable to anyone – including us.
privacy.dataHashes: Admin token hash: A cryptographic hash (SHA-256) to verify admin rights. The actual token never leaves your browser.
privacy.dataServer: Technical data: IP address (only temporarily in memory for rate limiting, not stored), poll expiry date.
privacy.dataNone: We do not use cookies, tracking, analytics or third-party services.
privacy.hostingText: Cumond is hosted on a server by Exoscale in the Zurich data centre (Switzerland). No data is transferred abroad.
privacy.retentionText: Polls are automatically and irrevocably deleted after the expiry date chosen by the creator (90 days or 1 year). Admins can manually delete their poll at any time.
privacy.rightsText: Under the Swiss Data Protection Act (nDSG), you have the right to access, rectify and delete your data. Since we have no access to your poll data due to encryption, you can delete it yourself at any time via the admin link.
privacy.contactText: For data protection questions, contact us at:
